summary.title: Professional Summary
summary.content: Results-driven Feature Designer with 3+ years optimizing mobile game systems for 40k+ DAU products. Proven track record delivering 71% monetization improvements and 35% retention increases through data-driven feature design and rigorous A/B testing frameworks. Expertise in cross-functional collaboration, comprehensive documentation processes, and stakeholder alignment across engineering, product, and analytics teams. Led feature specification and implementation for 25+ major systems including LiveOps, progression mechanics, and competitive leaderboards that contributed to 10x user growth at PlaySimple Games.

items.summary:
• Authored comprehensive feature specifications for 25+ major systems (seasonal events, battle pass, PvP leaderboards), enabling cross-functional teams to deliver features 30% faster with 95% requirement accuracy
  • Analyzed 50+ competitive mobile games using SensorTower and Data.ai, identifying 8 monetization opportunities that influenced product roadmap and contributed to 71% revenue increase
  • Implemented A/B testing framework across 15+ features, validating design decisions through data-driven feedback loops that improved feature performance by average 25% post-launch
  • Spearheaded Word Roll feature roadmap during hypergrowth phase (2024-2025), contributing to 10x DAU expansion from 4k to 40k+ users through strategic feature prioritization
  • Designed event-driven economy systems and reward mechanics for Word Roll, generating 71% monetization increase through optimized player purchase funnels
  • Redesigned core game features using behavioral analytics from 40k+ DAU, increasing average session time by 43% and improving D1 retention
  • Architected progression systems and daily engagement mechanics, boosting 7-day retention by 35% and increasing daily session frequency by 2.3x for Word Roll's player base
  • Developed AI-powered productivity tools (Spec Maker, Meeting Manager) using Cursor AI, reducing feature documentation time by 25% and accelerating sprint planning by 40% across 8-person team
  • Launched 5+ personalized LiveOps events using Kinoa.io cohort targeting, achieving 23% higher engagement rates compared to non-segmented campaigns

items.name: Game Development

items.title: Monetization Leadership
items.summary: Designed Food Fiesta event mechanics featuring balanced gacha systems and progressive rewards, generating 71% monetization increase and establishing template for future LiveOps events

items.title: Retention Optimization
items.summary: Redesigned Ticket Mania leaderboard architecture with skill-based matchmaking and dynamic rewards, increasing player LTV by 10% and improving D1 retention rate by 300 basis points

items.title: Engagement Innovation
items.summary: Transformed Word of the Day from passive feature to interactive collection mechanic, achieving 140 basis points D1 retention improvement and 3% overall engagement increase

items.title: AI Innovation & Productivity
items.summary: Built AI-assisted Spec Maker and Meeting Manager tools, improving team efficiency by 25% and becoming standard workflow for 8-person development team

items.title: LiveOps Excellence
items.summary: Launched 5+ personalized events using Kinoa.io cohort targeting, achieving 23% higher engagement rates and establishing sustainable LiveOps pipeline for Word Roll

items.name: Food Fiesta Event System
items.description: Cross-mode event system tying all game modes to core word-making loop
items.summary: Designed comprehensive event infrastructure connecting multiple game modes, introduced cosmetic reward systems, and balanced progression mechanics. Result: 22% ARPDAU increase, 3% overall engagement boost, and reusable framework for future events.

items.name: Ticket Mania Leaderboard Optimization
items.description: Interactive competitive system with skill-based matchmaking and dynamic feedback
items.summary: Redesigned passive leaderboard into active engagement system with ticket collection mechanics and clear player feedback loops. Collaborated with PMs on fair bucketing logic and UX team on feedback density optimization.

items.name: AI Productivity Suite
items.description: Custom AI-powered tools for game design workflow optimization
items.summary: Developed Spec Maker and Meeting Manager using Cursor AI to automate feature documentation and sprint planning. Integrated with existing JIRA/Confluence workflows while maintaining quality standards.

metadata.notes: Optimized resume for ATS compatibility and hiring manager impact. Features enhanced bullet points using Action+What+Result formula, quantified achievements, and mobile game industry terminology. Export as PDF for best formatting, DOCX when Word format required.
